Define data science and explain its interdisciplinary nature involving computer science and statistics.

Identify key historical milestones and developments in the evolution of data science from the 1960s to the present.  
Describe the emergence and impact of programming languages and tools that advanced data science.  
Recognize current methods and future directions in data science, including statistics, machine learning, and artificial intelligence.
